title: Identity - User and Role Events
description: JSON Schema definitions for Identity & Access Management domain events. These events are published via SNS when users or roles are created, updated, or deleted through the Identity service. Derived from the monolith's SecurityManager.cs user/role CRUD operations and migrated to Cognito-backed identity management.

eventEnvelope.description: Common event envelope shared by all Identity domain events. Provides tracing, versioning, and source identification for SNS-published messages.

eventType.description: Fully qualified event type following the naming convention {domain}.{entity}.{action}.

correlationId.description: UUID for distributed tracing and request correlation. Enables idempotent event processing across consumers.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the event was produced.

source.description: Constant identifying the Identity service as the event source.

data.description: Domain-specific event payload. Structure varies by eventType.

userCreatedEvent.description: Published when a new user is created in the Identity service. Derived from SecurityManager.SaveUser which creates a user record with username, email, first_name, last_name, password, role assignments ($user_role.id), and enabled status via RecordManager.CreateRecord.

userId.description: GUID of the created user. Corresponds to the record 'id' field in the monolith's user entity.

username.description: Unique username. Enforced by SecurityManager.SaveUser uniqueness validation against existing users.

email.description: User email address. Validated by IsValidEmail using System.Net.Mail.MailAddress. Must be unique across all users.

firstName.description: User's first name. Maps to the 'first_name' field in the monolith's user entity.

lastName.description: User's last name. Maps to the 'last_name' field in the monolith's user entity.

roleIds.description: Array of role GUIDs assigned to the user. Derived from the $user_role.id many-to-many relation. Standard roles include AdministratorRoleId, RegularRoleId, and GuestRoleId which map to Cognito groups.

enabled.description: Whether the user account is enabled. Disabled accounts cannot authenticate.

createdBy.description: GUID of the user who performed the creation. May be the SystemUserId for automated operations.

userUpdatedEvent.description: Published when an existing user is updated in the Identity service. Derived from SecurityManager.SaveUser which conditionally updates only changed fields (username, email, password, enabled, verified, first_name, last_name, image, and role assignments).

username.description: Current username of the updated user.

email.description: Current email of the updated user.

changedFields.description: List of field names that were modified in this update. Possible values include: 'username', 'email', 'password', 'firstName', 'lastName', 'enabled', 'verified', 'image', 'roleIds'.

updatedBy.description: GUID of the user who performed the update.

userDeletedEvent.description: Published when a user is deleted from the Identity service. Includes identifying information for downstream consumers to clean up references.

username.description: Username of the deleted user at the time of deletion.

email.description: Email of the deleted user at the time of deletion.

deletedBy.description: GUID of the user who performed the deletion.

roleCreatedEvent.description: Published when a new role is created in the Identity service. Derived from SecurityManager.SaveRole which creates a role record with name and description via RecordManager.CreateRecord. Role names must be unique. System roles (Administrator, Regular, Guest) map to Cognito groups.

roleId.description: GUID of the created role. System roles: AdministratorRoleId (BDC56420-CAF0-4030-8A0E-D264938E0CDA), RegularRoleId (F16EC6DB-626D-4C27-8DE0-3E7CE542C55F), GuestRoleId (987148B1-AFA8-4B33-8616-55861E5FD065).

roleName.description: Unique role name. Enforced by SaveRole uniqueness check against all existing roles.

description.description: Role description. Normalized to an empty string if null by SaveRole.

createdBy.description: GUID of the user who created the role.

roleUpdatedEvent.description: Published when an existing role is updated in the Identity service. Derived from SecurityManager.SaveRole which can update the role name (with uniqueness validation) and description.

updatedBy.description: GUID of the user who performed the update.

roleDeletedEvent.description: Published when a role is deleted from the Identity service. Downstream consumers should remove role references from their local data stores.

roleName.description: Role name at the time of deletion.

deletedBy.description: GUID of the user who performed the deletion.
